mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER_SECURITY_AUDIT (AUDIT_ID, MEMBER_ID, LOGIN_ID, NICKNAME, LOGIN_TYPE, EVENT_TYPE, EVENT_RESULT, EVENT_REASON, IP_ADDRESS, OCCURRED_AT, EXPIRES_AT) VALUES (SEQ_MEMBER_SECURITY_AUDIT.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{loginId}, #{nickname}, #{loginType}, #{eventType}, #{eventResult}, #{eventReason}, #{ipAddress}, SYSTIMESTAMP, ADD_MONTHS(SYSTIMESTAMP, 12))
mapper.select: SELECT AUDIT_ID auditId, MEMBER_ID memberId, LOGIN_ID loginId, NICKNAME nickname, LOGIN_TYPE loginType, EVENT_TYPE eventType, EVENT_RESULT eventResult, EVENT_REASON eventReason, IP_ADDRESS ipAddress, OCCURRED_AT occurredAt, EXPIRES_AT expiresAt FROM MEMBER_SECURITY_AUDIT ORDER BY OCCURRED_AT DESC

SELECT AUDIT_ID auditId, MEMBER_ID memberId, LOGIN_ID loginId, NICKNAME nickname, LOGIN_TYPE loginType, EVENT_TYPE eventType, EVENT_RESULT eventResult, EVENT_REASON eventReason, IP_ADDRESS ipAddress, OCCURRED_AT occurredAt, EXPIRES_AT expiresAt FROM MEMBER_SECURITY_AUDIT WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY OCCURRED_AT DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM MEMBER_SECURITY_AUDIT WHERE EXPIRES_AT <= SYSTIMESTAMP
